task_1_operator_apis.notes: ReadOnlyRuntimeAPI with 5 read-only methods — LAW-K5-1, LAW-K5-3 verified. All 5 API tests pass.

task_2_operator_cli.notes: 8 CLI subcommands: status, trace, replay, worker, pause, resume, force-retry, traces. All routes through API/Hooks — no direct DB access. SystemExit caught cleanly in run(). All 5 CLI tests pass.

task_3_operator_hooks.notes: OperatorHooks with 4 methods (pause/resume/force_retry/replay). Every action produces checkpoint with operator_trace_id. All 5 hook tests pass.

task_4_ui_contract.notes: OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec with 10 paths, 11 schemas, X-Operator-Trace-Id on all paths. All 5 schema validation tests pass.

task_5_validation_tests.notes: 25 tests across 5 groups: ReadOnlyGuarantee(5), TracePropagation(5), HookSafety(5), CLI(5), ContractSchema(5).

acceptance_thresholds.task_1_api_read_only: PASS — no mutation paths in ReadOnlyRuntimeAPI
acceptance_thresholds.task_2_cli_no_direct_db: PASS — all CLI commands wrap API/Hooks
acceptance_thresholds.task_3_operator_trace_id: PASS — every hook action carries operator_trace_id
acceptance_thresholds.task_4_contract_complete: PASS — 10 paths defined, 11 schemas, all required headers
